Late at night at {place}, everyone knows it's {name}'s cab. The moment they step up to the machine, whoever's grinding for {{top_tier}} quietly steps aside - nobody wants to be the reason {name} loses their combo. {name}'s reputation on {game} is well known: they won't even glance at a challenger who hasn't cleared a {{hard_diff}} with {{full_combo}}, let alone one still stuck at {{mid_diff}}. But when {name}'s in a good mood, they'll actually stop and coach the newer players on {character}, and that's how half the server ended up chasing {{score_grade}} in the first place.
